name.zh: 东莞凯乐格服饰有限公司

description.zh: We are a professional Chinese manufacturer located in Humen Town Dongguan City Guangdong province, specializing in heavyweight hoodies from 400 GSM to 640 GSM, with 10+ years of experience in oversized streetwear production.
